description: Copy this file to comfyui-api-map.local.json and edit node ids after exporting a workflow in ComfyUI API format.
workflowNotes: Stable Audio 3 Medium Base blueprints commonly expose user_input, duration, seed, use_reprompt, and category on a single subgraph node.
The runner can auto-patch matching input names. Keep explicit node ids here when you want deterministic control.
